---
title: "Data Standards for eDNA: DwC-A, MIxS, and the DNA Derived Data Extension"
description: "One sentence description."
time: "~60 min"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Add packages as needed
```

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## {{< fa bullseye >}} Learning objectives

By the end of this episode, you will be able to:

- Objective one
- Objective two
- Objective three
:::

::: {.callout-important icon=false collapse=true}
## Prerequisites for this episode

- Completed [Episode 2: OBIS & Darwin Core](02-obis-darwin-core.qmd)
- Prerequisite placeholder.
:::

---

## Section heading

Content placeholder.

---

::: {.callout-caution icon=false}
## 🧪 Exercise 3.1: Exercise title

Exercise placeholder.

::: {.callout-caution icon=false collapse=true}
## Solution

Solution placeholder.
:::
:::

---

::: {.instructor-only}
::: {.callout-warning icon=false}
## {{< fa chalkboard-teacher >}} Instructor notes

**Estimated time:** NA minutes

**Pacing notes:**

- Note placeholder.

**Common errors:**

- Error placeholder.

**Discussion prompts:**

- Discussion prompt placeholder.
:::
:::

---

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
## {{< fa key >}} Key points

- Key point one.
- Key point two.
- Key point three.
:::
